title: JSON path compiler accepts invalid input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data JSON NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, data->>'name' AS name FROM json_test WHERE (data->>'value')::INTEGER > 100;
UPDATE json_test SET data = jsonb_set(data::jsonb, '{new_key}', '"new_value"'::jsonb) WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: JSON path compiler accepts invalid JSON input
